etymology: Hoppy = hopping (he has no limbs and moves by hopping)
wordplay_note: A limbless man who hops — literal and darkly comic
card_description: Hoppy Harrington (meaning "Hoppy = hopping (he has no limbs and moves by hopping)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. Phocomelus (born without limbs) who develops telekinetic powers after nuclear war. Name note: A limbless man who hops — literal and darkly comic. Disability transformed into superhuman power — the outcast as secret tyrant. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: Phocomelus (born without limbs) who develops telekinetic powers after nuclear war
reference.etymology: Hoppy = hopping (he has no limbs and moves by hopping)
reference.significance: Disability transformed into superhuman power — the outcast as secret tyrant
